headline: How one founder’s bet on ‘the old school web’ is paying off
summary: Former Meta engineer Craig Campbell is succeeding with a website, shunning AI investment. His "old school web" venture, Past Maps, shows profitability. Campbell's previous e-commerce tool sale underscores his tech founder expertise.

headline: AI grifters are creating fake Black people to sell Shein junk
summary: AI is being used to create fake Black influencers on TikTok. These AI-generated personas promote cheap Shein products. The practice raises ethical concerns about exploitation and online deception.

headline: Sometimes, a short game hits the spot
summary: "Slots & Daggers," a unique roguelike combining slot machines and deckbuilding, was a favorite game last year. Its engrossing loop and steady meta-progression make each run rewarding. The game demonstrates the appeal of well-designed short-form gaming experiences.

headline: The SpaceX IPO is great for Elon Musk and terrible for you
summary: The author criticizes the proposed SpaceX IPO, comparing its risks to WeWork's failure. It suggests the IPO is structured to benefit Elon Musk at public investors' expense. The article warns potential investors about the inherent dangers.

headline: Cleveland: Home of Heroes
summary: A new Cleveland exhibition highlights the city's role in inspiring comic book characters. It explores how Superman, Miles Morales, and others originated from Cleveland. The exhibit celebrates the city's rich contribution to comic lore.

headline: The Wandering Inn Interview: Pirateaba Talks LitRPG Success and Inspiration
summary: This article features an interview with Pirateaba, author of "The Wandering Inn." The discussion covers the author's LitRPG success and creative inspirations. It offers insights into the popular web serial's development.

headline: In 007 First Light, Bond’s BS Is His Best Weapon
summary: The game "007 First Light" introduces a unique "bluff system." This system allows James Bond's deception skills to become a primary weapon. It reimagines Bond's classic charm and cunning for gameplay.

headline: Bungie Thanks Fans With First Look at Monumental Destiny 2 Update
summary: Bungie revealed "Monument of Triumph," Destiny 2's final major content update. Fans anticipate it might be the game's best singular update in years. This release serves as a thank you to the dedicated player base.

headline: Palace was handed Andrew's controversial envoy emails six years ago
summary: The Royal Household received thousands of emails concerning Prince Andrew's financial dealings in 2020. These controversial communications detail his work as a trade envoy. The revelation highlights long-standing concerns about his past activities.

headline: No deal announced after Trump meeting to make 'final determination' on Iran
summary: Trump met with advisors to finalize a decision on Iran, but no deal was announced. Officials previously confirmed a US-Iran framework agreement. The meeting's outcome leaves the future of US-Iran relations uncertain.

headline: Arrive three hours before flight home, airline boss tells UK holidaymakers
summary: Wizz Air CEO advises UK holidaymakers to arrive three hours before their return flight. Passengers should also carry portable chargers and water due to potential long queues. The advice aims to mitigate travel delays and discomfort during peak times.

headline: Liverpool sack head coach Arne Slot year after Premier League title win
summary: Liverpool has sacked head coach Arne Slot after two seasons in charge. This decision comes one year after their Premier League title win. Andoni Iraola is currently the leading contender to replace him.
